title: How Do I?
description: Looking for a quick answer? This section organizes "How Do I?" information that different audiences might find useful.
text:
At DHS
Find DHS forms, DHS employee resources, DHS Open Data, training opportunities, web tools and apps; how to report waste, fraud, or abuse, and provide feedback or make complaints to DHS.
For Businesses
Find and apply for grants, import/export forms, prepare your business for an emergency, verify employment eligibility (E-Verify), and work with DHS Science and Technology (S&T).
For the Public
DHS can help you become a citizen, prepare for natural disasters, learn about cyber security, find a job at DHS, complete Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests, provide feedback to DHS, and more.
For Travelers
Learn how to check travel wait times, apply for a U.S. passport, cross U.S. borders, what you can bring on a plane, and more.
All "How Do I?" Pages
Visit all the "How Do I" topics, listed alphabetically.
